account.purpose: openjanus secondary account — holds JanusFlow router + impl (per-token vault contracts)

IJanusFlowImpl.name: IJanusFlowImpl
IJanusFlowImpl.purpose: Interface contract for swappable implementations — stateless pure-logic pattern

JanusFlowImpl.name: JanusFlowImpl
JanusFlowImpl.purpose: Initial implementation — ElGamal-on-BabyJubjub (Hermez ceremony + Flow VRF beacon)

JanusFlow.name: JanusFlow
JanusFlow.purpose: Router + custody for confidential FLOW wrapping — state never moves on impl swap

JanusFlow_legacy.name: JanusFlow
JanusFlow_legacy.note: Legacy v1 Pedersen-based, zombie — cannot be removed without service account. Do not use.

architecture.custodyStrategy: custody stays in JanusFlow router forever (vault never moves on impl swap)
architecture.proofVerification: EVM side (JanusToken.sol Groth16 verifier) — Cadence side does structural validation only
architecture.userPattern: per-user COA (each user's COA is their msg.sender in JanusToken)
architecture.tokenScope: per-token instances (this instance: FLOW; future JanusUSDC = separate deploy)

testNotes: 31 assertions ran, 2 initially flagged as FAIL were confirmed to be test-harness JSON-parsing bugs
Contract behavior verified correct: time-lock enforced (pre-condition fires), pending version set properly
Admin: pause/unpause/proposeImplSwap/cancelImplSwap all verified via sealed txs
Time-lock: finalizeImplSwap pre-condition correctly rejects before 48h (TX sealed with error code 1101)

timeLockTest.finalizeResult: REJECTED — pre-condition 'time-lock has not expired yet' fired correctly
